Family-owned, serving DC, Maryland, and Virginia. From Bethesda homeowners pressing for family visits to Arlington property managers needing a 40K sq ft office cleaned overnight and same-play-book show-up on time, we do the work right and leave better than we found it.
"Carpet like new after 8 years of kids and pets." — Sandy, Bethesda

From Bethesda single-family homes to Tysons townhouses, Midland brings commercial-grade equipment and eco-friendly chemistry into your living room. Our crews show up on time, treat your home like their own, and leave behind carpet and floors that look like the day they were installed. Fast dry times, kid-safe and pet-safe products, and a guarantee in writing.
"40K sq ft office cleaned overnight. No downtime." — Arlington Property Manager

Built for facilities that can't shut down. Midland works nights, weekends, and holidays so your tenants and customers never see the disruption, only the result. COI-ready crews, EPA-registered chemistry, and one named DMV account lead on every visit. From a 40K sq ft Class A office to a single-suite federal contractor, we'll build a program around your floors, your hours, and your budget.
We believe our clients' testimonials speak louder than our marketing. Here's what DMV homeowners and facility managers say about working with us.

settings.testimonial_content: Very professional. Knowledgeable and willing to educate. Will refer Midland to anyone that needs carpet cleaning and repair soon to come.
40K sq ft office cleaned overnight. No downtime, no excuses. We see the result, not the work. Exactly what we wanted from a vendor.
Carpet like new after 8 years of kids and pets. The team showed up on time and treated the place like their own.

tabs.tab_title: How fast can you get on-site?
tabs.tab_content: Most DMV clients get a site visit within 48 hours and a written quote 24-48 hours after. Same-day emergency dispatch. Call (240) 532-9097.
Yes. Fully insured. COI, W-9, and SDS sheets are emailed the same business day you ask.

tabs.tab_title: Do you handle nights, weekends, and emergencies?
tabs.tab_content: Yes. Most commercial work happens nights, weekends, and holidays. Same-day emergency response is available. Call (240) 532-9097.

tabs.tab_title: What's the difference vs. national chains?
tabs.tab_content: We're a local DMV flooring contractor, not a national franchise. One named account lead, custom programs, faster response, no annual lock-ins.
